name: Spaghetti with Bacon & Egg
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon until lightly crisp. Drain and reserve 2 tablespoons drippings.
2. Coarsely chop the bacon and set aside.
3. Melt butter in the bacon drippings, add wine and pepper, and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Cook spaghetti according to package directions.
5. Add bacon to the butter-wine mixture.
6. Quickly pour beaten eggs into the sauce with the bacon (the heat from the pasta will cook the eggs). Mix gently.
7. Drain pasta well and toss with the bacon sauce and beaten eggs.
8. Mix in half the grated cheese, then serve with extra cheese on the side for topping.
9. For those looking to reduce fats, Eggbeaters can be substituted for the eggs.
